{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Fisher Remnant
| introduced = Skysworn
}}

== Skysworn ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|A [[Fisher Remnant]] was used by [[Lindon]] and Gesha for dissection.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c4">''Skysworn'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|A [[Fisher Remnant]] arm can have a [[Snare]] [[binding]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c7">''Skysworn'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
